item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-06 - Today's Summary
item.description: Coding agent and AI agent framework categories continue to dominate developer attention, together accounting for 9 of the top 100 projects and averaging 868 and 1175 daily stars respectively. The MCP/tool calling category, though represented by only one project, shows the highest average daily delta (1219) and weekly delta (10026), suggesting concentrated interest in tool-use infrastructure. Open Notebook (lfnovo/open-notebook) stands out as a sustained hot project in the 'Other AI' category, gaining 1053 stars in 24 hours as a self-hosted Notebook LM alternative. Hacker News discussions reflect broader AI industry debates—Claude's impact on rsync bugs, recursive self-improvement, and S&P 500 blocking AI companies—but no direct cross-source convergence with GitHub trending projects. The absence of new product launches on Product Hunt today means attention signals are purely from GitHub and HN, with no launch-day amplification. Top projects: mvanhorn/last30days-skill, safishamsi/graphify, github/copilot-sdk, lfnovo/open-notebook, NVIDIA/cosmos, esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix, rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch, chopratejas/headroom, CopilotKit/CopilotKit, affaan-m/ECC, nexu-io/open-design, NousResearch/hermes-agent Note: GitHub API 只提供当前 stars，总量变化来自本项目保存的历史 snapshot。 Note: daily delta 使用约 24h 前 snapshot，weekly delta 使用约 7 天前 snapshot。 Note: Accelerating 只展示至少 3 天历史基线且今日 delta 超过前 3 日均值 2 倍的项目。 Note: Potential Score 为规则评分，用于排序，不代表项目质量结论。

item.title: [sustained_hot] mvanhorn/last30days-skill (+653 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: An AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web, then synthesizes a grounded summary. Why it matters: With 28,083 stars, 2,386 forks, and a 24-hour delta of +814 stars, this project is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. The recent v3 release and active commits (within 7 days) keep the momentum fresh. Developer insight: The project signals a shift toward agent-based research that bypasses traditional search engines. For AI developers, it shows the value of bridging walled-garden platforms and using engagement signals (upvotes, likes, market odds) as ranking signals. The modular skill architecture (via Agent Skills) is a pattern worth adopting. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] safishamsi/graphify (+613 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Graphify turns any codebase, docs, or media into a queryable knowledge graph for AI coding assistants. Why it matters: With 60,136 stars and a 24-hour delta of +613, Graphify is experiencing sustained high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), indicating steady organic adoption rather than a sudden spike. The project has a recent release and commits within 7 days, showing active maintenance. This is a mature, widely adopted tool in the AI coding assistant ecosystem. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward structured knowledge management in AI-assisted development. Instead of relying on raw file context, developers can now build and query a semantic graph of their entire project. This reduces token usage, improves answer quality, and enables cross-modal understanding (code + docs + images). The trend suggests that knowledge graphs will become a standard component of AI coding workflows. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] github/copilot-sdk (+302 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Multi-language SDK to embed GitHub Copilot's agent runtime into any application. Why it matters: The repo is sustaining high attention with 9,281 stars and a 24-hour delta of +463 stars, indicating strong ongoing interest. The acceleration ratio is low (1), which means the growth is steady rather than explosive, but the sustained_hot trend type confirms consistent daily engagement. This is not a flash-in-the-pan spike; it's a project that has built and maintained momentum over time. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward embedding agentic AI workflows directly into applications rather than relying on standalone chat interfaces. The SDK's BYOK support also indicates a trend toward flexibility in model provider choice, which could reduce vendor lock-in for AI features. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] lfnovo/open-notebook (+1053 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: Open-source, self-hosted alternative to Google Notebook LM with multi-model AI support, podcast generation, and privacy-first design. Why it matters: The project has 25,724 stars and gained 1,304 stars in the last 24 hours, indicating strong and sustained attention. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), suggesting steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. This consistent velocity makes it a reliable project to watch for developers interested in AI-powered note-taking and research tools. Developer insight: Signals a shift toward decentralized AI applications where users demand control over data and model selection. The multi-provider approach reduces dependency on single vendors and aligns with the growing 'local-first' AI movement. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] NVIDIA/cosmos (+332 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: World Models / Physical AI / Multimodal Foundation Models Description: NVIDIA Cosmos is an open platform of world models, datasets, and tools for building Physical AI in robotics, autonomous vehicles, and smart infrastructure. Why it matters: With 9,457 stars and a 24-hour delta of +682, Cosmos is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is low (1), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. The recent release of Cosmos 3 (within 30 days) and active commits within 7 days keep the project top-of-mind for the AI community. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward unified multimodal models for Physical AI, reducing the need to combine separate vision, language, and action models. Developers should evaluate Cosmos for tasks like synthetic data generation, policy learning, and world simulation. Risk: Low
item.category: World Models / Physical AI / Multimodal Foundation Models

item.title: [sustained_hot] esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix (+523 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for the terminal, rewritten in Go for prefix-cache stability and low token costs. Why it matters: With 18,664 stars, a 24-hour delta of +523, and a 7-day average delta of 735.1, the project shows sustained high velocity. The acceleration ratio of 0.8 indicates steady growth without sudden spikes, suggesting consistent community interest and adoption. Developer insight: Signals a shift toward specialized, model-native agents that optimize for API costs and session persistence, rather than generic chat interfaces. The Go rewrite also highlights the trend of moving from interpreted to compiled languages for performance and distribution. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch (+610 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A massive, free, open-source curriculum (503 lessons, 20 phases) that teaches AI engineering from math foundations to autonomous swarms, with every lesson producing a reusable artifact. Why it matters: With 29,096 stars, a 7-day delta of 7,996 stars, and a 3-day average delta of 3,693, this repo is experiencing explosive organic growth. The 24-hour delta of 610 stars and medium acceleration (0.2) indicate sustained, high-velocity attention. The curriculum's promise to bridge the 84% usage vs. 18% preparedness gap resonates strongly as AI adoption accelerates. Developer insight: The demand for structured, from-scratch AI education is massive and growing. Developers are moving beyond API wrappers and seeking foundational understanding. This repo signals a shift toward 'deep learning' in the literal sense—building internal models of how AI works, not just using black-box tools. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] chopratejas/headroom (+2112 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Headroom compresses AI agent inputs (tool outputs, logs, RAG chunks) by 60-95% before they reach the LLM, preserving answer quality while slashing token costs. Why it matters: Headroom is on a massive growth tear: 14,883 total stars, with a 24-hour delta of 1,942 and a 3-day average of 3,307.5 stars per day. The acceleration ratio of 0.6 indicates sustained high velocity rather than a sudden spike, meaning the project has captured ongoing developer attention. This is a rare level of sustained interest for a utility library. Developer insight: Token compression is becoming a critical layer in the AI stack. Headroom's approach — local-first, reversible, multi-algorithm — signals a shift from simple prompt engineering to systematic context optimization. Developers should evaluate compression as a standard part of their LLM pipeline, especially for agentic workloads where context windows fill rapidly. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] CopilotKit/CopilotKit (+670 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: CopilotKit is a full-stack SDK for building agent-native applications with Generative UI, shared state, and human-in-the-loop workflows across React, Angular, Vue, React Native, and chat platforms like Slack and Teams. Why it matters: With 32,918 stars, a 24-hour delta of +670 (acceleration 5.6), and a 7-day average of 59.7 stars/day, the project is experiencing a sudden breakout. The high acceleration (>2.0) and recent release indicate a surge in attention, likely driven by new multi-platform support (Angular, Vue, React Native, Slack, Teams) and the AG-UI protocol gaining industry adoption. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward agent-native UI as a first-class concern, not an afterthought. The AG-UI protocol could become a standard for agent-user interaction, similar to how GraphQL standardized API queries. Developers should evaluate whether to adopt this stack or risk building custom, fragmented solutions. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] affaan-m/ECC (+1219 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: A harness-native operator system that optimizes AI agent performance across multiple coding assistants (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.) with skills, memory, security, and continuous learning. Why it matters: With 208K+ stars, a 24-hour star delta of 2,762, and a 7-day average of 1,647, this project is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.3 indicates steady momentum rather than a sudden spike, suggesting deep community adoption. The recent v2.0.0-rc.1 release (Apr 2026) adds operator workflows, a dashboard GUI, and Rust control-plane alpha, signaling active development and expanding scope. Developer insight: The rise of ECC signals a shift toward platform-level tooling for AI agents. Developers are moving beyond single-harness configs to cross-harness systems that manage skills, memory, and security centrally. This trend suggests that the next wave of AI developer tools will focus on orchestration and optimization rather than just agent capabilities. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] nexu-io/open-design (+788 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Native desktop app. ⚡ 259+ Skills · ✨ 142+ Design Systems 🖼️ Web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Claude Code / OpenClaw / Codex / Cursor / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi & 17+ CLIs. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +788，总 stars 59,757，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] NousResearch/hermes-agent (+2765 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: The agent that grows with you Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2765，总 stars 184,071，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
